reported_entities.name: Microsoft Azure
reported_entities.claim: Advantech is a Microsoft Global Cloud Solution Provider and Gold Cloud Platform Partner; Azure is described as Advantech's main IaaS/PaaS partner. Products include WISE-DeviceOn integration with Azure and Azure IoT Edge hardware packages. Also confirmed by Microsoft's connectivity partner ecosystem announcement at Hannover Messe (with Softing and PTC Kepware) at https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/iotblog/partners-accelerating-industrial-transformation-with-azure-iot-operations/4284126 and WISE-PaaS/IoTSuite listed on Azure Marketplace at https://azuremarketplace.microsoft.com/en-us/marketplace/apps/advantech.wise-pass_iotsuite_on_windows?tab=overview

reported_entities.name: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
reported_entities.claim: Advantech and AWS collaborate to offer combined benefits of leading-edge IIoT technologies; pre-integration of Advantech's WISE-EdgeLink technology with the AWS IoT Greengrass service to connect OT devices in manufacturing facilities and accelerate PoC/PoV projects.

reported_entities.name: Alibaba Cloud
reported_entities.claim: Advantech's WISE-DeviceOn and EnSaaS cross-cloud management integrate with Alibaba Cloud alongside Azure and AWS, supporting cross-cloud management and target market localization (notably for China market).

reported_entities.name: Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
reported_entities.claim: Advantech's WISE-PaaS IIoT Cloud Platform documentation states the platform supports multiple cloud infrastructures including Amazon Web Services, Azure, Google Cloud Platform, and OpenStack (private cloud).

notes: Salva discovery run (objective=find_partnership_signals, industry='industrial IoT', keywords incl. Advantech/IIoT/cloud partnership/Azure/AWS) returned retrieval_health=ok but qualified_count=0 -- no entities passed qualification, so Salva alone yielded no usable results for this task. Findings above are from 2 WebSearch queries confirming Advantech's documented IIoT cloud partnerships. Microsoft Azure and AWS are the two partnerships with explicit dedicated press releases / partner-program status (Gold Cloud Platform Partner for Azure; named AWS collaboration on WISE-EdgeLink + AWS IoT Greengrass). Alibaba Cloud and Google Cloud Platform appear as supported/integrated cloud targets in Advantech's own product documentation (WISE-DeviceOn, EnSaaS, WISE-PaaS whitepaper) but with less explicit 'partnership' press coverage than Azure/AWS -- flagged as lower confidence than the top two.
